item.title: That would explain a lot of things.
item.description: The worst part is she's right on every point.
item.dc:creator: Pentjotal

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
never been a big fan of the taste or hangovers of wine
if you play your cards right
i wonder what the heart breaking into 2 pieces represents
pretty sure that's not supposed to happen
nothin wrong with that
more power to her. farting gives you power.
dislike
toads look dirtier
i'll disgust both of you again and you'll like it
pretty much
stay out wimps!!
i'm sorry what
this did not age well
and the problem is?
mmm hmm
how can we be sure?
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Trying to do more daily dirty posts dis week to catch up on my over 3k memes I have piled up to share. enjoy!
well fudge didnt I just post dis one too. so many duplicates. that is why I do these posts tho before sorting into deviousness folder.
purdy.
yes I can.
om, I dont feel this is true anymore. Thank you Pookie :p
I have so many tshirts. all of the tshirts.
only 40%?
cuddled into bed for naps always a good time.
very important safety glasses.
om.
that and one other thing.
I miss rain.
sometimes you do wanna just be held and loved and stuffs. cuddles are always good.
I didnt. and now I am making some great friendships to remember there is better then lousy lovers in this world.
playing with my rubber duckies. and shit.
hate this shit. like just say what you want and mean and dont play fucking games. too old for that shit.
I am amazing and everyones problem now.
but its sunday so this is my exact plans. kind of. weekends are for doing dis I thought?
mhmm.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We had a super successful little secret santa! Thank you to everyone who participated. I learned a lot and look forward to doing it next year! We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "I want to dance always, to be good and not evil, and when it is all over not to have the feeling that I might have done better." - Ruth St. Denis I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe

item.title: What Happened Today #24
item.description: Trump continues backing Musk, a viral video shows a woman dragged from an Idaho town hall, and the US votes against blaming Russia for its invasion of Ukraine. Get busy, call, protest, write. #GovBriefToday #Resist And, HEY IMGUR - I promised you would be the first to know, and you are. The website went live tonight.

Relatable... Also, it's so cool seeing such an honest question getting asked and answered in such a way, gives me a little hope.

item.dc:creator: 0lm3ca

item.title: Some good news
item.description: https://bsky.app/profile/keithedwards.bsky.social/post/3lixis557v424 https://www.pa.gov/governor/newsroom/2025-press-releases/gov-shapiro-update-federal-funding-freeze.html See below for the Governor’s remarks as prepared for delivery: Good afternoon. Less than two weeks ago, my Office filed a lawsuit challenging the Trump Administration’s illegal freeze of federal funding because of its direct impact on Pennsylvania state government and our work to serve the good people of our Commonwealth. On the day we filed, at least $2.1 billion in federal funding that had been appropriated by Congress and obligated by the federal government to our state agencies was frozen or placed in an undefined review. That included funding to prevent sinkholes and make abandoned mines safe... Funding to plug abandoned wells leaking toxic chemicals into our communities... ...and funding to reduce energy costs for homeowners and ensure the water flowing to Pennsylvanians’ faucets is clean and pure. Today, I’m here to provide an update on where things stand. As a result of our lawsuit – and our continued pressure on and engagement with the Trump Administration... In which we demanded the Administration comply with the legal injunctions currently in place and made clear that we were ready to seek immediate relief from the courts... ...every dollar we identified at the filing of our lawsuit is currently unfrozen and once again accessible to Pennsylvania state agencies, in accordance with legal injunctions currently in place. With the funding restored, we will now resume critical programs and infrastructure projects that have been jeopardized by this illegal freeze. There are some who questioned why we would sue the federal government in this matter. As I said at the time, legal action was not my first choice – and in fact, after the funding freeze first went into effect in late January, we actively engaged with our Republican Congressional delegation, led by Senator McCormick, and the Trump Administration to get these funds unfrozen. We saw some progress, but despite those efforts – and multiple court orders to release the federal funding – billions of dollars owed to Pennsylvania remained tied up weeks later. That’s why we sought and received delegation from the Office of Attorney General to represent my Office and affected state agencies in this litigation. Look, you don’t need to be the former Attorney General – or even a lawyer – to get this. This is basic stuff. Kids learn this in grade school. It’s how our Constitution works. Congress passed laws that committed billions of dollars to the states for serious needs. The president signed those bills into law. Then, the federal government entered into agreements with state government agencies to get those dollars out into people’s communities. Those agreements are binding. To put it simply: a deal is a deal. The Trump Administration is legally required to provide these funds. That is why I took legal action. But we can walk and chew gum at the same time. So even after we filed our lawsuit 11 days ago, my team and I continued to engage the Department of Justice and Trump Administration directly. When I was at the White House on Friday, I repeatedly brought up our frozen federal funding to President Trump’s senior team and cabinet. I urged them to follow the law and honor their agreements with Pennsylvania. As a result of that direct engagement, our funding is unfrozen, they are now following the law, and we will continue to press our case. For now, thanks to this federal funding flowing to our agencies once again, we can resume important work for the good people of Pennsylvania without subjecting Pennsylvanians to the risk that the Commonwealth would receive a bill for work that should’ve been paid for by the federal government. Work that includes plugging orphaned and abandoned wells – and creating good-paying jobs in the process. Work to clean up our waterways, help our farmers deal with runoff that leads into the Chesapeake Bay, and ensure Pennsylvanians have clean water when they turn on the tap. Work to repair abandoned mines before they turn into sinkholes and endanger people’s homes and businesses so we can prevent another tragedy like what we saw in Westmoreland County in December. Pennsylvania is home to more abandoned mines than any other state in the country – and we still have 140,000 acres that need to be fixed. We’re resuming work to reduce utility bills for consumers and make sure rural communities have reliable access to electricity. As a result of the freeze, several ongoing projects in the western part of our Commonwealth – employing dozens of Pennsylvanians – had stopped work. These folks can now get back on the job, knowing their Governor will continue to have their back. As Governor, it’s my job to protect Pennsylvania’s interests – and I will use every tool at my disposal, from legal action to my direct engagement to make sure Pennsylvanians are protected... ...and the funds that Pennsylvanians rely on every day – the funds that Pennsylvanians pay in federal taxes... ...make their way back to our Commonwealth and we receive every federal dollar we’re owed. Thank you. END TRANSCRIPT. **** With all the negative news and rage bait out there.. I'm taking this as a win. However small it is. It's a win. It will have a positive effect on people's lives. Please try and stay positive in these dark times. Take time out from doom scrolling and whatnot. Take care out there.
item.dc:creator: FragileDonkey

item.title: If you're having a bad day, here's an assortment wholesome dump to make you smile : )
item.description:
1. That's how you have fun
2. Chunky boyyy
3. Doggos acting like drunk buddies at a bar
4. Piggy getting combed
5. Bunny making its bunny bed
6. Them eyebrows
7
8
9. This game looks fun
10. Getting a shower
11. Cow zoomies
12. Horsie zoomies
13. Here we have a tree logging machine having breakfeast in its natural habitat
14. Otter having its temperature taken : )
15 Thank you if you made this far in the dump! Let me share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I'm also working on a game of my own. A passion project, if you will. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired first person narrative game. If you like the vibe of this dump, you might actually like the game to (at least what my friend on Discord tells me, that one friend). Anyway please wishlist it helps small game devs like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great week!!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Dump #287
item.description:
1 Hey, y’all! I’m Ashleigh (they/them) and I post memes.
2 Special hello to my fellow meme dealers and user sub browsers. Also, hey if you gay!
3 Reminder that trolling/harrassing comments will be muted and reported to Imgur with screenshots.
4
5
6 I feel very passionately about her, okay?!?
7 This is easier than you think.
8
9 This also happens in the summer where I’m from by way of INTENSE humidity.
10 It takes several days of processing.
11
12 This show is bananas!
13 That bitch is due every month!
14 I mean, I’m not for shaming in general, but like I can’t imagine having that man as an ex.
15 Hamburger Help Me: Stir My Stroganoff ™️
16
17
18
19
20
21 I absolutely love miniatures and have been following a group that makes them for a while now. Look how tiny ???
22
23
24
25 Going to Flavortown, Baby!
26 It’s always morally correct to punch Nazis.
27 Also, RIP Howie the Crab
28 It makes the sex so much better.
29 My eyeeeeeeeeees.
30 ???
31 Unbearable horniness and yearning are, at times, quite inconvenient.
32
33
34 Wanna thank ya motha for a butt like that.
35 I gave away free merch in the meme wars.
36
37
38
39
40 Me when I go out in nature.
41 Also Doechii is the best (in case you want context for the meme)
42 YEARNING
43 SO TINY
44
45
46
47
48
49
50
